categories.name: Frontend Applications
categories.description: Client-side and content-first starters for SPAs and static sites.
categories.details: Pick these when you need a browser UI without a full-stack framework — React + Vite for SPAs, Astro for content sites.

categories.name: Backend Applications
categories.description: API and service starters for NestJS, Hono, and similar Node backends.
categories.details: Use when the deliverable is an HTTP API or worker — NestJS for modular services, Hono for lean edge/serverless handlers.

categories.name: Full Stack Applications
categories.description: Frameworks that own routing, rendering, and server logic in one app.
categories.details: Choose Next.js or React Router (Remix) when UI and server routes should live in the same codebase.

categories.name: Monorepo Boilerplate
categories.description: Multi-package workspaces with shared tooling and release flow.
categories.details: Start here when you need apps and packages in one repo with Turborepo pipelines and Changesets.

categories.name: User Acceptance Testing
categories.description: Browser automation projects for end-to-end acceptance suites.
categories.details: Use when the repo itself is a WebdriverIO (or similar) test harness, not an application under test.

categories.name: Web Extension
categories.description: Browser extension starters with React and Vite.
categories.details: Scaffold popup, options, and newtab surfaces that target Chrome, Firefox, and Edge via WebExtension APIs.

templates.name: NestJS Boilerplate
templates.description: Modular NestJS API with TypeScript, ESLint, and Prettier. Reach for it when you want controllers, providers, and clear module boundaries from day one.

templates.name: NextJS Starter
templates.description: Next.js App Router starter with TypeScript and a feature-based layout. Use it for full-stack React apps that need server components, routes, and optional auth examples.

templates.name: Turborepo Boilerplate
templates.description: Turborepo workspace with TypeScript, Changesets, and shared packages. Best when multiple apps share UI or config and you want pipeline caching.

templates.name: React Vite Boilerplate
templates.description: React SPA on Vite with React Router and TypeScript. Choose it for client-only apps where instant HMR and a lean build matter more than SSR.

templates.name: Web Extension React Boilerplate
templates.description: React + Vite WebExtension with HMR and polyfills. Use it for Chrome/Firefox/Edge extensions that share a React UI across popup and pages.

templates.name: WebdriverIO Boilerplate
templates.description: WebdriverIO + TypeScript harness with Selenoid-friendly setup. Scaffold this when the project is an acceptance-test suite, not the app under test.

templates.name: NextJS SaaS AI Starter
templates.description: Multi-tenant Next.js SaaS with AI providers, Auth.js v5, Drizzle + PostgreSQL, Tailwind v4, shadcn/ui, RBAC, audit logs, webhooks, and i18n. The flagship product showcase — not a minimal starter.

templates.name: Remix / React Router v7 Starter
templates.description: React Router v7 with file-based routes, loaders/actions, and TypeScript. Pick it when you want SSR and nested data routes without the Next.js App Router model.

templates.name: Astro Starter
templates.description: Astro static site with TypeScript and island-friendly structure. Ideal for docs, marketing, and content sites that ship HTML first and hydrate only where needed.

templates.name: Hono Starter
templates.description: Minimal Hono API in TypeScript. Use it for edge, serverless, or small HTTP services where NestJS would be heavier than you need.

extensions.name: GitHub Setup
extensions.description: Automate GitHub workflows with Actions, Dependabot, and templates for issues and pull requests.

extensions.name: GitHub Setup for User Acceptance Testing
extensions.description: This extension adds GitHub setup to your project including GitHub Actions, Dependabot, Issue Templates, Pull Request Templates, and more. It also adds a GitHub Action to run User Acceptance Tests using Selenium.

extensions.name: Husky + Lint Staged
extensions.description: Improve code quality with pre-commit hooks using Husky and Lint Staged.

extensions.name: Husky + Lint Staged (Monorepo)
extensions.description: Improve code quality with pre-commit hooks using Husky and Lint Staged for monorepo projects.

extensions.name: Development Container
extensions.description: Set up a development container with Docker and VSCode for consistent environments.

extensions.name: Jest + React Testing Library
extensions.description: Add Jest and React Testing Library for unit and integration testing in React projects.

extensions.name: Vitest + React Testing Library
extensions.description: Add Vitest and React Testing Library for fast Vite-native unit and integration testing in React projects.

extensions.name: Playwright E2E
extensions.description: Add Playwright end-to-end browser testing with multi-browser config, dev-server bootstrap, and CI workflow.

extensions.name: React i18n
extensions.description: Add internationalization support to your React app with react-i18n and async backend.

extensions.name: TanStack React Query
extensions.description: High-quality open-source software for web developers.

extensions.name: React Hook Form
extensions.description: Extension to add React Hook Form, a performant, flexible and extensible forms with easy-to-use validation.

extensions.name: Jotai
extensions.description: Extension to add Jotai, a small and fast state management library for React

extensions.name: Recoil.js (Deprecated)
extensions.description: Extension to add Recoil.js, a state management library for React. Note: Recoil is no longer maintained by Meta (formerly Facebook Experimental) and may not receive future updates.

extensions.name: Hookstate
extensions.description: Add Hookstate, a modern state management solution with hooks-based API and TypeScript support.

extensions.name: MobX
extensions.description: Extension to add MobX, a tiny state management library for React

extensions.name: Teaful (Deprecated)
extensions.description: Add Teaful, a tiny and fast state management solution with a simple API and TypeScript support. Note: Teaful has very low adoption (~126 weekly downloads) and may not receive future updates.

extensions.name: Valtio
extensions.description: Extension to add Valtio, a tiny state management library for React

extensions.name: XState
extensions.description: Add XState, a state management and orchestration solution for complex state machines and workflows.

extensions.name: Zustand
extensions.description: Add Zustand, a small, fast and scalable state management solution with a simple API and TypeScript support.

extensions.name: React Redux with Redux Saga
extensions.description: Extension to add Redux Toolkit (RTK) with React Redux bindings and Redux Saga for side-effect management

extensions.name: React Redux with Redux Toolkit
extensions.description: Extension to add Redux Toolkit (RTK) with React Redux bindings, redux-persist, and redux-logger for a fully configured store

extensions.name: Cross Platform Apps with Ionic React + Capacitor
extensions.description: Add Ionic React and Capacitor to your cross platform react app

extensions.name: Docker Compose Setup
extensions.description: Add docker environments for development and production to your project setup with docker-compose

extensions.name: Android Tools
extensions.description: Avoid using heavy IDEs by installing this extension that creates an elegant tool setup for your android app

extensions.name: Semantic UI React
extensions.description: Extension to add Semantic UI React to your setup

extensions.name: Semantic UI React with Theme
extensions.description: Extension to add Semantic UI React to your setup with theme customization

extensions.name: Material UI
extensions.description: Add Material UI components and theming capabilities to your React application with TypeScript support and best practices.

extensions.name: Ant Design for React
extensions.description: Add Ant Design React components with TypeScript support, theming capabilities and enterprise-grade UI patterns.

extensions.name: Bootstrap React
extensions.description: Add Bootstrap React components with TypeScript support and responsive design patterns.

extensions.name: Drizzle ORM SQLite
extensions.description: Add Drizzle ORM with SQLite to your NestJS API with TypeScript support and best practices for database operations.

extensions.name: Drizzle ORM PostgreSQL
extensions.description: Add Drizzle ORM with PostgreSQL to your NestJS API with TypeScript support and best practices for database operations.

extensions.name: Mongoose ORM MongoDB
extensions.description: Add Mongoose ORM with MongoDB to your NestJS API with TypeScript support and best practices for NoSQL database operations.

extensions.name: Serverless Framework
extensions.description: Add Serverless Framework packaging to deploy your NestJS API to AWS Lambda with TypeScript support and best practices for serverless architecture.

extensions.name: React Million DOM Optimization
extensions.description: Extension to add Million DOM Optimization to your React app

extensions.name: OpenAPI
extensions.description: Extension to add OpenAPI documentation to your NestJS API

extensions.name: React Electron Vite
extensions.description: Add Electron to your cross platform React Vite app

extensions.name: Tailwind CSS
extensions.description: Add Tailwind CSS utility-first styling with PostCSS and dark mode class strategy.

extensions.name: shadcn/ui
extensions.description: Add shadcn/ui component primitives (Radix UI + Tailwind CSS) with variant-based theming utilities.

extensions.name: Tailwind CSS for Next.js
extensions.description: Add Tailwind CSS v4 to your Next.js project with PostCSS configuration and utility-first CSS setup.

extensions.name: shadcn/ui for Next.js
extensions.description: Add shadcn/ui component library to your Next.js project with Radix UI primitives, class-variance-authority, and a cn() utility.

extensions.name: Drizzle ORM + PostgreSQL for Next.js
extensions.description: Add Drizzle ORM with PostgreSQL to your Next.js project. Includes schema setup, migrations, Docker Compose for local development, and db:* scripts.

extensions.name: Auth.js v5 for Next.js
extensions.description: Add Auth.js v5 (next-auth@beta, latest: 5.0.0-beta.31) to your Next.js project with OAuth providers support, database sessions, and TypeScript-typed session. Note: v5 remains in beta as of 2026 — see https://authjs.dev for updates.

extensions.name: t3-env for Next.js
extensions.description: Add type-safe environment variable validation with @t3-oss/env-nextjs and Zod, including server/client split and SKIP_ENV_VALIDATION for CI.

extensions.name: tRPC for Next.js
extensions.description: Add tRPC v11 with TanStack Query and App Router fetch adapter for end-to-end type-safe APIs without code generation.

extensions.name: next-intl (i18n) for Next.js
extensions.description: Add internationalization to your Next.js project using next-intl with English and Spanish translations, middleware routing, and type-safe message access.

extensions.name: Sentry for Next.js
extensions.description: Add Sentry error tracking and performance monitoring to your Next.js project with client/server configuration and source map upload support.

extensions.name: Apollo Client for React
extensions.description: Add Apollo Client for GraphQL data fetching, caching, and state management in React applications.

extensions.name: Storybook
extensions.description: Add Storybook for isolated component development, visual testing, and interactive documentation.

extensions.name: React Query for Next.js
extensions.description: Add TanStack React Query with SSR-compatible setup for Next.js App Router, including hydration support and query client factory.

extensions.name: Prisma for Next.js
extensions.description: Add Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL for type-safe database access, schema management, and migrations in Next.js.

extensions.name: Turso/libSQL for Next.js
extensions.description: Add Turso (libSQL) database client with Drizzle ORM for edge-ready SQLite database access in Next.js.

extensions.name: React Router v7
extensions.description: Adds React Router v7 with BrowserRouter setup and sample pages.
